ng-searchix-legacy

Advanced Search for AngularJS 1.5.8+

Try it out:

• Click the search button above

• Or press Ctrl+K (Windows/Linux) or Cmd+K (Mac)

• When search is empty, you'll see Recent items

• Hover over items to see action buttons:

  - Delete button (×) for recent items

  - External link button (↗) for items with href

• Type to filter results

• Use ↑ ↓ to navigate

• Press Enter to select

• Press Esc to close

Programmatic Control

Selected Item:

{{ $ctrl.selectedItem | json }}

Built with ❤️ for AngularJS 1.x applications

View on GitHub
